descFull: [GenAI Application Development Framework]  🚀 Build GenAI application quick and easy 💬 Easy to interact with GenAI agent in code using structure data and chained-calls syntax 🧩 Use Event-Driven Flow *TriggerFlow* to manage complex GenAI working logic 🔀 Switch to any model without rewrite application code
